title: Clockwork: Atlas
description: Atlas is an addon for Valkyrien Skies and Clockwork that fix original config file for a ship block blacklist. This allows you to prevent players from placing or assembling specified blocks onto ships.
body:
# Clockwork: atlas

Atlas is an addon for Valkyrien Skies and Clockwork that fix original config file for a ship block blacklist. This allows you to prevent players from placing or assembling specified blocks onto ships.
